title: Hyperliquid Sentiment
summary_title: Sentiment's margin lending and perp-collateralized loans on Hyperliquid
summary_description: How Sentiment enables 15-20% APY on wrapped stake HYPE and introduces novel perp collateral and coin margin products exclusive to Hyperliquid EVM.

key_moments.label: Space intro and guest welcome from Zerk and Zerx Snarks
Zerx introduces Sentiment: margin lending protocol with TradFi origins and evolution from undercollateralized loans
Margin lending explained: how Sentiment differs from Aave forks with direct leverage instead of looping
Upcoming 15x wrapped stake HYPE feature delivering 15-20% APY with minimal borrow rates
Perp collateral and coin margin products: enabling delta-neutral strategies and leveraging unrealized P&L
Technical walkthrough: using perp positions as collateral on Sentiment interface with precompiles integration
Timeline: USDC support in 4 weeks, audit-ready in 6 weeks, precompiles expected within 6 weeks
Points incentives announced for early participants; protocol already live with phased rollout planned
